name: kimiqb
description: KimiQB packages a vibecoding-first Kimi Code planning workflow with project comprehension, evidence traceability, ontology, Ledger v2 continuity, session handoffs, and gated apply-run artifacts.
author: Alican Kiraz

interface.shortDescription: Gate-aware planning and apply workflow for Kimi Code
interface.longDescription: KimiQB helps Kimi Code inspect a repository, ask repo-aware intake questions, create a master project plan, autopsy existing project state, preserve project comprehension, ontology, and Ledger v2 continuity, decompose the plan into phase-level sub-plans, audit evidence traceability and readiness, then compile canonical Kimi Code session prompts and gated apply-run artifacts when the audit allows implementation.
